title: TechCrunch: GlobalTech Restructures 1,200 Roles in AI Pivot
snippet: GlobalTech restructures 1,200 positions — 800 transfer to AI subsidiary, 400 offered voluntary exit with generous severance.
content: GlobalTech Corporation is reshuffling 1,200 employees as part of its newly announced 'Accelerate AI' strategy. The details, per an SEC filing and company press release: roughly two-thirds of affected workers (800) will transfer to a new subsidiary called TechForward Inc., keeping their pay and benefits. The remaining 400 are being offered a voluntary separation package that includes six months of salary and a year of healthcare — unusually generous by industry standards. Notably, CEO Diana Torres emphasized that no one is being involuntarily terminated and that the company's revenue grew 3.1% in FY2023 to $14.2 billion.
